summary: Fixed a fakematch around HSD_CObjSetCurrent by correcting its signature to take only HSD_CObj*, removing an unused callback/Event argument from the gobj caller path, typing the render pass as HSD_RenderPass, replacing raw switch constants with HSD_RP_* enum names, and factoring the offscreen camera setup into a static helper to preserve matching codegen.
what_changed: Changed HSD_CObjSetCurrent from bool HSD_CObjSetCurrent(HSD_CObj* cobj, cobj_UnkCallback1 arg1) to bool HSD_CObjSetCurrent(HSD_CObj* cobj).
Updated the cobj.h prototype to match the corrected one-argument HSD_CObjSetCurrent signature.
Changed HSD_GObj_803910D8 from void HSD_GObj_803910D8(HSD_GObj* gobj, Event arg1) to void HSD_GObj_803910D8(HSD_GObj* gobj).
Updated HSD_GObj_803910D8 to call HSD_CObjSetCurrent(gobj->hsd_obj) without forwarding an Event argument.
Updated the gobj.h prototype for HSD_GObj_803910D8 to remove the Event parameter.
In HSD_CObjSetCurrent, changed render_pass from int to HSD_RenderPass.
Replaced raw render pass switch cases 3, 0, 1, and 2 with HSD_RP_OFFSCREEN, HSD_RP_SCREEN, HSD_RP_TOPHALF, and HSD_RP_BOTTOMHALF.
Added static bool setupOffscreenCamera(HSD_CObj* cobj), containing GXSetViewport, GXSetScissor, GXSetProjection, and makeProjectionMtx logic for HSD_RP_OFFSCREEN.
Removed the local Mtx44 mtx from HSD_CObjSetCurrent and moved the offscreen Mtx44 into setupOffscreenCamera.
smart_moves: The fix removed apparently unused parameters rather than preserving a misleading fake signature; this aligned both the implementation and headers with observed use.

Factoring the offscreen-camera case into setupOffscreenCamera allowed HSD_CObjSetCurrent to avoid carrying a local Mtx44 used only by one switch arm, which is a common decomp tactic for matching stack layout and register allocation.
Using HSD_RenderPass and HSD_RP_* names made the switch semantics explicit while keeping behavior equivalent to the prior numeric constants.
The caller HSD_GObj_803910D8 and both headers were updated in the same patch, reducing signature drift between cobj and gobj baselib code.
decomp_lessons: If a function parameter exists only to satisfy an earlier fakematch and is not used by the target logic, check callers and headers; the correct match may require deleting the parameter across the call chain.
Small helper extraction can be a legitimate matching tool, especially when a local temporary such as Mtx44 only belongs to one branch of a larger function.
Prefer project enums such as HSD_RenderPass over raw integers once the enum meaning is known; this documents control flow without changing generated behavior when types line up.
When changing a baselib function signature, update all visible prototypes and immediate callers together to avoid propagating stale inferred types.

For camera/render-pass setup code, compare branch-local stack requirements; offscreen setup may need a projection matrix local while normal/top-half/bottom-half helpers already encapsulate their own setup.
naming_conventions: New helper uses lower camel case consistent with nearby static helpers: setupOffscreenCamera, setupNormalCamera, setupTopHalfCamera, setupBottomHalfCamera.
Render pass enum constants use HSD_RP_* naming: HSD_RP_OFFSCREEN, HSD_RP_SCREEN, HSD_RP_TOPHALF, HSD_RP_BOTTOMHALF.
Public baselib camera API remains HSD_CObj* prefixed: HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_CObjEndCurrent.
Unresolved gobj symbol names remain address-based, e.g. HSD_GObj_803910D8, rather than inventing semantic names without evidence.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed unused parameters from HSD_CObjSetCurrent and HSD_GObj_803910D8 to fix a fakematch signature/call sequence.
Moved offscreen camera code into a separate static bool helper with its own Mtx44 local, likely affecting stack layout and register pressure in HSD_CObjSetCurrent.
Replaced setNewProjection(cobj, mtx) in the offscreen case with inline-equivalent GXSetProjection(mtx, makeProjectionMtx(cobj, mtx)) inside setupOffscreenCamera.
Changed render_pass to HSD_RenderPass and switched on enum labels while preserving the same case mapping: offscreen=3, screen=0, top half=1, bottom half=2.
Kept the offscreen helper returning true so the HSD_CObjSetCurrent switch can assign result consistently with other setup helper calls.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename HSD_GObj_803910D8 or identify its real gobj render callback purpose.
Check whether cobj_UnkCallback1 remained used elsewhere after this PR or became removable/renamable.
Search for other HSD_CObjSetCurrent call sites to confirm all use the corrected one-argument signature.
Look for matching notes around setupNormalCamera, setupTopHalfCamera, and setupBottomHalfCamera to compare helper extraction patterns.
Investigate whether HSD_RenderPass enum definitions document the numeric mapping used here.
